name: RequirementsAgent
description: Decomposes feature requests into structured requirement briefs with objectives, constraints, success criteria, assumptions, and risks

name: ArchitectureReviewAgent
description: Evaluates requirements against architectural layers (API, business, data, security) and produces comprehensive architecture reviews

name: PlanningAgent
description: Produces detailed implementation plans with phased task breakdown, dependencies, risk mitigation, and success metrics

name: TestingAgent
description: Designs comprehensive test coverage including unit, integration, E2E, performance, and security tests

name: ReleaseReadinessAgent
description: Synthesizes all artifacts to assess release readiness and produce a decision report for HITL gate

name: FinanceComplianceAgent
description: Extends ArchitectureReviewAgent to inject SOX compliance checks for financial systems

name: TaxValidationAgent
description: Python-based polyglot agent that validates requirements against tax domain rules via JSON stdin/stdout contract
